payload.answer: SQL debug execution is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false. No SQL was run and no memory was created.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL command, not a durable user memory statement.

details: Rejected /brain admin sql request because SQL debug mode is disabled.
No memory cards were created or modified.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED in a safe admin/debug environment before issuing SQL debug commands.
Use supported non-SQL admin/debug commands if available.
